creator: 000.fbsd@quip.cz
text:
Created attachment 245853
update of supervisord.conf.sample

I installed py-supervisor and when I compared supervisord.conf.sample with the output of echo_supervisord_conf command I noticed our supervisord.conf.sample is slightly outdated so I created this patch. The resulting conf.sample is direct output of echo_supervisord_conf with fixed path for socket file, logfile and pidfile.
